title: Upgradeable Spawners
description: Upgrade mob spawners to boost spawn rate, lower spawn delay, or make spawned mobs have low HP or no AI
body:
![upgradeable spawners datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/upgradeable_spawner.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![upgradeable spawners minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/upgradeable-spawners/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## How it works Attach an item frame to a spawner and put the matching item (module) in it ## Module Features You can attach modules to spawners to upgrade them | Upgrade | Item | Description | Default | 1 Module | 2 Modules | 3 Modules | 4 Modules | |---------|------|-------------|---------|----------|-----------|-----------|-----------| | **Spawn Count** | Tears Music Disc | Increases the number of spawned mobs | 4 mobs | 6 mobs | 8 mobs | 12 mobs | 16 mobs | | **Spawn Delay** | Trident | Decreases the spawn delay | 10-40 sec | 10-20 sec | 10-15 sec | 5-10 sec | 5 sec | | **Player Distance** | Totem of Undying | Increases the player distance for spawner activation | 16 blocks | 32 blocks | 64 blocks | 96 blocks | 128 blocks | | **Spawn Range** | Beacon | Increases the spawn range of the spawner | 9x3x9 | 7x3x7 | 5x3x5 | 3x3x3 | 0x3x0 | | **NoAI** | Creeper Banner Pattern | Spawned mobs have no AI | - | - | - | - | - | | **Low HP** | Turtle Helmet | Spawned mobs have reduced health | Full HP | 6 HP | 4 HP | 2 HP | 1 HP | ## Config To enable and disable upgrades ``` /trigger upgradeable_spawners.config ```
